title: chylismia atwoodii
intro: Chylismia atwoodii, also known as Atwood's evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chylismia atwoodii include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to support immune system function. Chylismia atwoodii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used topically to calm irritated skin.
